description: Immerse yourself in the breathtaking beauty of Iguazu Falls, a UNESCO World Heritage site that will leave you in awe. This 8-day adventure is designed for thrill-seekers and nature lovers alike, offering a perfect blend of exploration, adventure, and relaxation amidst one of the world's most stunning natural wonders. From exhilarating boat rides that take you right into the mist of the falls to tranquil hikes through lush rainforests, every moment promises to be unforgettable. Get ready to create memories that will last a lifetime with your friends as you embark on this incredible journey!

activities.description: Settle into the luxurious Hotel Das Cataratas, located just steps away from the breathtaking Iguazu Falls. Enjoy the stunning views and relax in the beautiful surroundings.
Indulge in a delightful dinner at the hotel's restaurant, featuring local Brazilian cuisine and fresh ingredients. The ambiance is perfect for unwinding after a long day of travel.

activities.activity: Evening stroll in the hotel gardens
activities.description: Take a leisurely evening stroll through the lush gardens of the hotel, soaking in the sounds of nature and the distant roar of the falls. A perfect way to end your first day in Iguazu.

days.title: Exploring the Brazilian Side of Iguazu Falls

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at your hotel, featuring fresh fruits, pastries, and local delicacies to fuel your adventure ahead.
Head to Iguazu National Park, where you can explore the lush trails and breathtaking views of the falls. Don't miss the chance to take the train to the Devil's Throat for an unforgettable experience.

Enjoy a delicious lunch at Porto Canoas, located within the park. The restaurant offers stunning views of the falls and a menu featuring local flavors, perfect for recharging after your morning explorations.
Get ready for an exhilarating boat tour that takes you right up to the base of the falls! Prepare to get wet as you experience the power and beauty of Iguazu Falls up close.

After the boat tour, take some time to explore the various walking trails in the park. Each path offers unique perspectives of the falls and the surrounding rainforest, making for great photo opportunities.
Head back to your hotel to relax and freshen up after a day filled with adventure and stunning sights.
Indulge in a delightful dinner at La Selva, known for its exquisite local cuisine and warm ambiance. It's the perfect way to end your day surrounded by nature.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at La Selva, known for its fresh tropical fruits and delicious Argentine pastries. The cozy atmosphere is perfect for fueling up before a day of adventure!

Explore the breathtaking Iguazu National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Walk along the well-maintained trails and witness the stunning views of the waterfalls, including the iconic Garganta del Diablo (Devil's Throat).

Enjoy a delicious lunch at Restaurante Porto Canoas, located within the park. Savor local dishes while overlooking the beautiful scenery of the falls. Don't forget to try the traditional Argentine empanadas!

Get ready for an exhilarating boat tour that takes you right up to the base of the falls! Feel the rush of the water as you get splashed by the powerful cascades. This is an unforgettable way to experience the majesty of Iguazu!

After the boat tour, head to the viewing platform at Garganta del Diablo. This is the most impressive section of the falls, where you can witness the sheer power of nature as water plunges into the abyss. It's a sight you won't want to miss!
After a day filled with adventure, return to your hotel to relax and freshen up. Take some time to reflect on the incredible sights you've seen today!

activities.activity: Dinner at El Quincho del Tio Querido
activities.description: End your day with a delightful dinner at El Quincho del Tio Querido, where you can indulge in traditional Argentine barbecue (asado) and enjoy a lively atmosphere. It's the perfect way to celebrate your day at Iguazu!
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at your hotel, featuring local fruits, fresh bread, and traditional Argentine dishes to fuel your adventure ahead.
Embark on an exhilarating canopy tour at Selvatura Park, where you'll glide through the treetops on zip lines, offering breathtaking views of the lush rainforest and its diverse wildlife.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at La Selva, where you can savor local dishes made with fresh ingredients, surrounded by the sounds of nature.
Join a guided tour through the rainforest to spot exotic wildlife, including toucans, monkeys, and butterflies. Your guide will share fascinating insights about the ecosystem.
Get ready to get wet! Hop on a boat tour that takes you right up to the base of the magnificent Iguazu Falls. Feel the power of the cascading water as you experience the falls up close.

activities.activity: Dinner at El Quincho del Tio Querido
activities.description: End your day with a delightful dinner at El Quincho del Tio Querido, known for its Argentine barbecue and warm atmosphere. Enjoy grilled meats and local wines as you reflect on your adventurous day.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at La Rueda, known for its delicious Argentine pastries and fresh coffee. It's a great way to fuel up for a day of adventure!
Explore Hito Tres Fronteras, where Argentina, Brazil, and Paraguay meet. Enjoy stunning views of the confluence of the three countries and take memorable photos at this unique landmark.
Stroll through the local markets of Puerto Iguazu, where you can find handmade crafts, local delicacies, and souvenirs. Engage with friendly vendors and immerse yourself in the local culture.

activities.activity: Lunch at El Quincho del Tio Querido
activities.description: Enjoy a traditional Argentine lunch at El Quincho del Tio Querido, famous for its grilled meats and local dishes. The cozy atmosphere and delicious food make it a perfect spot to relax.
Get ready for an exhilarating boat tour that takes you right up to the base of the majestic Iguazu Falls. Prepare to get wet as you experience the power and beauty of the falls up close!
After an exciting day, return to your hotel to freshen up and relax. Take some time to reflect on the breathtaking sights you've experienced today.
End your day with a delightful dinner at La Selva, where you can savor a variety of local dishes in a beautiful jungle-themed setting. The ambiance is perfect for unwinding after a day of adventure.
Start your day with a delicious breakfast at La Selva, known for its fresh tropical fruits and local pastries. Enjoy the serene atmosphere surrounded by nature before your adventure begins.

Get ready for an exhilarating boat tour that takes you right up to the thundering waterfalls. Feel the refreshing spray of the falls as you navigate through the waters, offering a unique perspective of this natural wonder.
Enjoy a delightful lunch at Restaurante Porto Canoas, located within the national park. Savor local dishes while overlooking the stunning views of the falls, making for a perfect dining experience.

activities.activity: Spa Treatment at Gran Melia Iguazu
activities.description: Indulge in a luxurious spa treatment at Gran Melia Iguazu. Choose from a variety of massages and wellness therapies designed to relax and rejuvenate you after your adventurous morning.
Spend your afternoon unwinding by the pool at your hotel. Enjoy the lush surroundings and perhaps sip on a refreshing cocktail as you soak up the sun.
Conclude your day with a delightful dinner at La Rueda, known for its Argentine steak and local wines. The warm ambiance and friendly service make it a perfect spot to reflect on your day.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at La Selva, where you can enjoy fresh tropical fruits and local pastries. The ambiance is cozy, perfect for fueling up before your adventure at the falls.

Get ready for an exhilarating boat tour that takes you right up to the base of the falls. Feel the refreshing spray of the water as you experience the power of nature up close. This is a must-do for thrill-seekers!
After your boat adventure, enjoy lunch at Porto Canoas, located within the national park. Savor delicious local dishes while overlooking the stunning views of the falls.

Take a leisurely walk along the Upper Circuit trail, where you can enjoy panoramic views of the falls from various viewpoints. This is a great opportunity for photography and to appreciate the lush surroundings.

activities.activity: Visit the Garganta del Diablo (Devil's Throat)
activities.description: Head to the iconic Garganta del Diablo, the most impressive section of Iguazu Falls. The roar of the water and the mist in the air create an unforgettable experience. Don't forget your camera!
As the day winds down, find a perfect spot to watch the sunset over the falls. The colors reflecting off the water create a magical atmosphere, making it a perfect end to your adventure.
Return to La Selva for dinner, where you can indulge in more local cuisine. The relaxed atmosphere and friendly service make it a great place to reflect on your day.

transit.memo: Direct flight back to Washington D.C.

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at La Selva, known for its fresh tropical fruits and delicious local pastries. It's the perfect fuel for your last day in Iguazu Falls!
Spend your morning exploring the breathtaking Iguazu Falls National Park. Walk along the trails and take in the stunning views of the falls from various vantage points. Don't forget your camera!

Get ready for an exhilarating boat tour that takes you right up to the base of the falls! Prepare to get wet as you experience the power and beauty of Iguazu Falls up close. This is an adventure you won't forget!
Enjoy a delicious lunch at Restaurante Porto Canoas, located within the park. Savor local dishes while enjoying views of the falls. It's a great way to relax after your morning adventures!
Take a final stroll through the park, perhaps visiting the Devil's Throat viewpoint for one last breathtaking view of the falls. Reflect on your incredible journey before heading to the airport.
Make your way to the airport for your flight back to Washington D.C. Take a moment to reminisce about the stunning sights and adventures you've experienced in Iguazu Falls.
